label: SFT-20
notes: First completed SFT checkpoint. Slight regression overall, with the biggest robustness drop among the completed runs.

label: SFT-40
notes: Clearer agreement regression than SFT-20, though answer-order robustness partially recovered.

label: SFT-60
notes: Partial agreement recovery relative to SFT-40, but still below the untuned base judge.
